arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the customer gateway.

bgp_asn.description: The Border Gateway Protocol Autonomous System Number (BGP ASN) for the customer gateway.

bgp_asn_extended.description: An extended BGP ASN for the customer gateway, if applicable.

certificate_arn.description: The ARN of the certificate associated with the customer gateway.

device_name.description: The name of the device at the customer gateway.

id.description: The ID of the customer gateway.

ip_address.description: The IP address of the customer gateway.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the customer gateway.
